channel.title: Xor on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Xor on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Matrix #3: Linear Basis (XOR Basis) & Simplex Method
item.description: XOR linear basis: full template with kth, range basis, normalisation; Nowcoder median example; CF 1101G prefix-XOR rank; gym 104768 C XOR-divisibility; Simplex LP solver.

item.title: Combinatorics #0: Common Formulae & Conclusions
item.description: A compact toolkit of geometric sums, floor-sum transformations, XOR facts, Fibonacci identities, and perfect-square patterns.

item.title: Combinatorics #0.1: 计数中常用的结论
item.description: 常见计数结论、Lucas 定理、不定方程解计数、平面分拆、DAG 路径计数、多项式平移、XOR 均匀性与若干竞赛常用结论。
